plugin.name: Dashboard
plugin.description: A live dashboard for toolkit activity, health signals, and useful next actions.
title: Your toolkit at a glance
subtitle: Track recent usage, keep an eye on backups and automation, and jump back into the parts of the toolkit that need attention.
workspace.title: Workspace pulse
workspace.note: A quick read on backups, shortcuts, workflows, and your output desk so you can decide what needs attention next.
activity.title: Recent activity
workspace.output.title: Output desk
workspace.output.meta: {count} item(s) are currently sitting in the default export folder.
workspace.backup.title: Backups
workspace.backup.meta.none: {schedule} cadence. No encrypted backup has been created yet.
workspace.backup.failed.title: Backup failed
workspace.backup.done.title: Backup created
workspace.workflows.title: Automation
workspace.workflows.meta.none: You do not have any saved workflows yet.
workspace.workflows.meta.some: Automation sequences are ready for repeat jobs and handoffs.
workspace.shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
workspace.shortcuts.meta: {count} global binding(s) configured. Use Shortcuts to adjust helper access.
activity.none: No tool activity has been logged yet.
